title: WebSiteMCP Manifest
description: The manifest format: a site's declaration of which contracts it offers and which contract and binding versions are pinned. Lives at domain/<reverse-DNS path>/manifest.json; the path is the site's identity.

$schema.description: Optional URL of the schema this file follows.

kind.description: Marks this file as a manifest.

version.description: The manifest version; bump it whenever a contract or binding pin changes.

contracts.description: The categories this site offers, each pinned to an exact contract and binding version.

id.description: Which contract this site offers; resolves to contract/<id>@<version>.json.

version.description: The exact contract version this site targets; must equal the binding's satisfiesContract.

binding.description: The exact binding version to load; its implemented tools are the site's live tool set.
